## Summary

Modify Cursor/VSCode user settings in settings.json. Use when you want to change editor settings, preferences, configuration, themes, font size, tab size,…

## Description

Modify Cursor/VSCode user settings in settings.json. Use when you want to change editor settings, preferences, configuration, themes, font size, tab size, format on save, auto save, keybindings, or any settings.json values.

## Invoke

Use **update-cursor-settings**.

`update-settings`, `configure-cursor`, `set-preference`
